zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fitton於大約1260年出生在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，他的父親Hugh Fitton of Bollin28歲，母親Mrs. Hugh Fitton29歲。他和Cicely de Massey至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1336年之後在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Fitton was born about 1260, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Fitton of Bollin, was 28 and his mother, Mrs. Hugh Fitton, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Cicely de Massey. He died after 1336, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fitton est né environ 1260, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Fitton of Bollin, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Hugh Fitton, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Cicely de Massey. Il est décédé après 1336, dans sa ville natale.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Cicely de Massey. Morì dopo il 1336, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fittonが約1260年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Hugh Fitton of Bollinは28歳，母Mrs. Hugh Fittonは29歳であった。彼はCicely de Masseyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1336年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fitton(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Fitton of Bollin(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Hugh Fitton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Cicely de Massey(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1336년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fitton родился около 1260 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh Fitton of Bollin было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Hugh Fitton, 29.
